---
title: "SectorMetrics.tsx"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\vis\components\SectorMetrics.tsx"
loc: 44
complexity: 8
logic_score: 6.55
style_score: 3.59
intel_score: 5.64
overall_score: 4.83
---

## Intent
The `SectorMetrics.tsx` module implements the visual representation of Gungnir Matrix scores for a specific file. It renders a structured list of performance indicators—including Logic, Style, Intelligence, and Anomaly scores—providing a granular breakdown of a sector's technical health.

## Interaction Protocol
This component is rendered within the selection panels. It receives a `Node` object and extracts the matrix metrics to display them as formatted, color-coded values according to the Linscott Standard.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [*](file://react)
- [Node](file://../types/index.ts)

### Exports
- `SectorMetrics`
- `SectorMetrics`
- `matrix`
- `overall`
- `logic`
- `style`
- `intel`
- `aesthetic`
- `stability`
- `coupling`
- `sovereignty`
- `anomaly`
- `gravity`
- `Metric`
